hero.title: <primary>toy'wI' ghom</primary> tIqel
hero.subtitle: Minecraft ghom'a'meyDaq, tIvqu' poH moj DuHmoHwI' poH. puqpu', Gedu'pu' Dun, je Minecraft — wa' Daq ngeHlu'. jaHDaq jIH mojaH, juppu' chu' wISuqta', Hujqu' nughpu' wISovmoH.

mission.heading: maH ngoQ
mission.text: Hoch QIn nIvbe'. toy'a' QaQ Hob 'oH Hoch latlh Hob rur. puqpu' toy'taHghach muSHa' wIlo' — juppu' QaQ je Gedu' tIqqu' — DaH batlh Qapla'.

playIsEssential.title: toy'a' nIS puqpu'
playIsEssential.description: toy'a' 'oH puq vum. tlhIngan tIq je Duj nIS. maH ghom'a'mey wI'el toy'a' peghHa' — Qunwaj, HIv, je bIH ghojmoHwI' — nItlhDaq QaD Hoch je.

friendsCarry.title: juppu' bIH HoS
friendsCarry.description: pagh jup Hutlh nIS. toy'a' je jupwI' poH puqpu' Hoch Dujmey HeghoH. maH ghom'a'meyDaq, puqpu' jupwI' wItIvqu'moH jaH QoQ tu'lu'meH.

keepChildrenSafe.title: moQ DIvI' Daq puqpu' yISuq
keepChildrenSafe.description: yItlhej, 'IHqu', je QaQ HablI' DIvI' wI'el. qoHwI' batlh SuvwI' wI'el — ghomwI' wI'el. bIQong'a'? ghobe'. qaS tIv.

familyInTheLoop.title: qorDu' Qu' SoH
familyInTheLoop.description: vav/SoSmey nIvbe'. SoH QaD puq toy'a'ghach ghoS Hoch ngoQmey — toy'a', chenmoH, jupwI' Suq — QaD Daq 'oH.

howClubsWork.heading: ghom'a'mey nuq
howClubsWork.paragraph1: wa' tup Hoch, toy'wI'pu' 'el — Gedu' chaHvaD jatlh. Gedu' QaD jaj De', puq HoS je ngoQ moj — jaH pIq je Haq.
howClubsWork.paragraph2: maH Gedu'pu' toy'wI'pu' chaH. bIH Sovchu' puqpu' je tengchaH ngupwI'pu' jupwI' chenmoHlu' HablI' je moQ. batlh vum chaH Hoch tup.
howClubsWork.paragraph3: Hoch maH ghom'a'mey HaqwI' De' ngeH — toy'wI'pu' je ghoS, chenmoh, je HaqwI'. Hoch tup, qoH laHmey, Duj De', je Qapla' wanI' nIvqu'.
howClubsWork.paragraph4: Hoch toy'wI' batlh ghoH — Daq moQ, jatlh, qoj moQ Dat. Hoch ngoQmey Doch Dat.

forParents.heading: vav/SoSmey
forParents.paragraph1: vav/SoS toy'a' ghojmoHghach nIvbe' — ghom'a'mey rur. maH vav/SoSmey HoS boq wImuS — batlh puq toy'a'ghach bIghoH.
forParents.paragraph2: SoH QaD — ngoQmey, qo'mey, je Huch — puq batlh Daq Gedu'pu' QaQ DaH ghoH.

easterEgg.heading: You found the Klingon translation!
easterEgg.intro: This interface has been translated into tlhIngan Hol as a tribute to Star Trek and its fans. Here are some of our favourite translations:
easterEgg.brandNameMeaning: War Game Academy — because to a Klingon, all games are battle training
easterEgg.taglineLabel: Where screen time becomes quality time
easterEgg.note: Date and time formatting appears in English because the browser's Intl APIs don't have Klingon locale data. Klingons don't use a 7-day week anyway.

hero.subtitle: Yty 'oH HoS Sogverse Qo'noS wIvmeH. QaQ Qu'mey — laHmey ghoj, jupwI' Suq, batlh ghoH, je DIvI' muv — toy'wI'pu' Yty Suq je Hoch.

overview.heading: Yty nuq ghoS
overview.paragraph1: Hoch toy'wI' pagh SoQ. Hoch poH, Hoch Qu', je Hoch batlh — toy'wI'pu' Yty Hoch 'ebbe' Suq. HSDu'mey chen loS ngoQmey — Hoch Hoch Duj chenmoH.
overview.paragraph2: toy'wI'pu' Yty Suqmo', Sogverse Yty boq — Hoch wanI' je Qu' chen.

elements.heading: Yty loS ngoQmey
elements.subheading: Hoch ngoQ toy'wI' Duj Hoch ngoQ Daj Del

harmony.name: batlh
harmony.detail: jIH nuq? batlh 'oH SoH nob — HoS je tIq. DuH je QaQ, QaQ ngoQmey, je meq Sov.

glow.name: wov
glow.detail: latlhmey DaQaHlaH nuq? wov 'oH tIqhom, batlh, je jonlu' Daj chenmoH. bIH boq, jatlh, je SoH Duj.

valor.name: HoS
valor.detail: qo' DachoHlaH nuq? HoS 'oH Daq Suq je HoS boq. vum, ngoQ ngeH, lo'laH ghoS, je Qap qo' ghoS.

wit.name: nI'
wit.detail: De' Daq bIghItlhlaH nuq? nI' 'oH QaQ, Qatlh De' je Qu'. HablI' ghoH Sov, De' Qatlh qel, je tIv je moQ boqHa'.

earning.heading: toy'wI'pu' Yty nuqDaq
earning.paragraph1: Yty HSDu'mey muv vo' Suq. Hoch Hogh ghom'a' poH muv, Qu'mey tIvmoH, jupwI' batlh, DIvI' wanI' je qo' — Hoch toy'wI' Yty boq.
earning.paragraph2: HSDu'mey Hoch Duj chen — ghom'a', Qav, je Qajma'. Hoch HSDu' Yty jer je Duj boq.
earning.paragraph3: toy'wI'pu' neH Dabe'. Gedu'pu', vav/SoSmey, je Hoch DIvI' Sogverse Yty boq — wanI' je Qu' Hoch.

cta.heading: qo' yIqet
cta.subheading: Sogverse yImuv — Yty yISuq. Hoch poH, Hoch jupwI', Hoch batlh — qo' choH.

passwordReset.subject: Sogverse mu'mey yIchoH
passwordReset.heading: mu'mey yIchoH
passwordReset.body: Sogverse mu'mey chovmoH tlhob Suqlu'. mu'mey chu' yIwIv.
passwordReset.expiry: ngeH Soch maH cha' rep Qav.
passwordReset.ignore: mu'mey chovmoH DatlhobHa'chugh, QIn yIleghQo'. mu'mey choHbe'lu'.

geduInvite.subject: Sogverse bejmoH ngeHlu'
geduInvite.heading: Sogverse bIghoS!
geduInvite.expiry: ngeH Soch maH cha' rep Qav.

feedback.subject: QIn {displayName} ({role}) vo'
feedback.heading: QIn chu' Suqlu'
feedback.gamerNote: QIn'vam toy'wI' account vo'. jangmey vav/SoS naDev ({parentEmail}) ghoS.

mouseflow.title: Sogverse yIDubmoH
mouseflow.body: Sogverse Beta 'oH. nuq Dalo'? 'e' wIyajqu' wIneH — vaj Hoch chaH yIDubmoH. Daqonta'bogh wIqonchugh maQap (DaQwI' vIH, jonta', je paq DaghoSpu'bogh). Sogverse pIn'a'pu' neH lulegh, je Beta rInchugh, Hoch wIteq.
